message:
Fix CLI error formatting, exit code, basket effect, and API header

- show.ts: Add message field to JSON error response for consistency
- bundles.ts: Add message field to JSON error response for consistency
- update-cli.ts: Use process.exit(1) instead of process.exitCode for immediate termination
- BasketSidebar.tsx: Remove duplicate useEffect that cleaned up invalid IDs
  (was causing potential infinite loop due to invalidIds array changing on every render)
- skills API: Sanitize ID in Content-Disposition header for defense-in-depth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
